headline: Is It Time To Reassess Netflix (NFLX) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Netflix at around US$90.92 is offering value or simply adding noise to your portfolio, this breakdown is designed to help you assess the stock using clear, grounded numbers. Over the last week, the share price shows a 3.6% decline. Over 30 days it is up 15.6%, with a 0.1% decline year to date and an 8.8% decline over the past year, alongside a very large 3-year return and a 77.1% gain over 5 years. Recent coverage around Netflix has continued to focus on its role...
